name: Felix Barry Moore
stanceSummary: Moore has repeatedly supported Israel in House statements and votes, including resolutions against Hamas and supplemental security funding for Israel during the Gaza war period.

timeline.event: Moore said he stands with Israel and backed H.Res. 771 affirming Israel's right to defend itself against Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad attacks.
Moore voted for the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act and said the U.S. should continue to support and supply Israel.
